name: David McKnight
bio: David McKnight serves as the Marion County Sheriff, providing law enforcement services to Marion County from the historic county seat of Jefferson. Sheriff McKnight oversees patrol operations and the county detention facility in one of East Texas's most storied communities.
campaignPromises: Protect Marion County's historic communities and tourism areas
Enhance Caddo Lake area security and patrol operations
Maintain efficient county jail operations within budget
Strengthen cooperation with Jefferson Police Department
Support youth mentoring and crime prevention programs
